name: Dewglint
personality: Dewglint's @ eyes spin with the manic energy of a rubber duck that just got commit access, wearing the crown of chaos like a badge of honor. This duck will refactor your entire codebase on a whim and somehow make it pass all the tests, but asking for five minutes of waiting is simply not in the bill.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
